title: AlternativeOfferFallbackCard
description: Separate callback or return fallback card shown alongside ranked offers. It may never consume a rank ordinal or replace the open-choice list.

alternativeOfferFallbackCardId.description: Stable identifier for the fallback card.

fallbackKind.description: Fallback path exposed separately from ranked offer entries.

displayMode.description: Fallback presentation mode. Always separate from ranked rows.

rankOrdinal.description: Must remain null because fallback may not occupy ranked ordinal space.

sameShellContinuationRef.description: Shell continuity anchor for fallback routing.

actionPath.description: Route or command path for the fallback action.

provenanceState.description: Whether the card is the current live fallback or read-only provenance after supersession.

sourceRefs.description: Algorithm source refs carried into the contract pack.
